name: first-mortgage-balance-loan-app-fallback
anchor: F1.FB fallback: loan_app when no mortgage_statement
rationale: Broker omits first_mortgage_balance. mortgage_statement doc is NOT attached (DS=M1). loan_application doc shows $225,000. F1.FB canonical-map falls back to loan_app source when mortgage_statement absent. Tests next-tier fallback within docs tier when authoritative source missing.
notes: Single-event sequence. Missing mortgage_statement; loan_app source becomes authoritative for F1.FB.
